Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Software Engineer position for university graduates at Google. Your focus on large scale systems and fresh ideas in AI aligns perfectly with my background in software engineering and automation. I enjoy solving complex problems where code needs to be both efficient and scalable.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript for eye-tracking systems at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned our installation process, reducing deployment time from 2 days to 2 hours. This 85% reduction made the system accessible to non-technical staff and eliminated a major bottleneck in our production cycle.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack platform that uses an AI agent to analyze real estate data. It processes 1,300 daily listings through a scraper and provides automated price estimations. This project allowed me to manage everything from PostgreSQL databases to client-side PDF generation.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I would love to bring my technical versatility and problem solving approach to a team at Google Singapore.
